notes: Mutually exclusive — how much of the truck the load takes.

modes.name: Full Truckload
modes.description: One shipper occupies the entire trailer end-to-end.

modes.name: Less than Truckload
modes.description: Multiple shipments share the trailer; usually rated by linear feet or pallet count.

modes.name: Partial Truckload
modes.description: More than LTL, less than FTL — typically 6+ pallets or 12+ linear feet.

modes.name: Volume LTL
modes.description: LTL pricing for loads that exceed standard LTL size limits but don't require a full truckload.
